news.summary: On May 12, 2025, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA) added $11,199.60 to its trust account, extending the deadline for a business combination by one month to June 13, 2025. This move allows the special purpose acquisition company more time to finalize a potential merger or acquisition.
news.headline: Inception Growth Acquisition Ltd deposited $11,199.60 to its trust account, extending business combination period by 1 month.

This dividend is set to be distributed on June 18, 2025, to shareholders recorded at the end of business on June 9, 2025.

news.summary: In Perrysburg, Ohio, on May 14, 2025, O-I Glass, Inc. (NYSE: OI) announced that Alan J. Murray is retiring from the company's Board of Directors post the Annual Meeting of Share Owners. Murray, a long-serving member of the Board, is stepping down after years of service. Additionally, at the same meeting, 11 director nominees were elected for one-year terms. Among the newly elected members are Eugenio Garza y Garza and Iain J. Mackay. The other directors elected are Samuel R. Chapin, David V. Clark, II, Eric J. Foss, Gordon J. Hardie, John Humphrey, Hari N. Nair, Cheri Phyfer, Catherine I. Slater, and Carol A. Williams.
news.headline: Alan J. Murray retiring from O-I board; Eugenio Garza y Garza and Iain J. Mackay elected. 11 directors elected.

news.summary: The board of directors at Farmer Mac, also known as the Federal Agricultural Mortgage Corporation, announced a dividend of $1.50 per share for each of its three classes of common stock for the second quarter of 2025. This includes Class A Voting Common Stock (NYSE: AGM.A).

news.summary: Downers Grove, Illinois - On May 14, 2025, Caldera, a division of Dover (NYSE: DOV), unveiled GrandRIP, a fresh subscription-based raster image processor ("RIP") solution tailored for clients in the large format visual communications, industrial printing, and packaging sectors. This newly introduced subscription package offers a comprehensive range of features and services to cater to the specific needs of customers in these industries.
news.headline: Caldera launches GrandRIP subscription for visual communications, printing, and packaging. Part of Dover (NYSE: DOV).

news.headline: HP Inc. declares cash dividend of $0.2894 per share on common stock.

news.summary: Nextracker, a prominent solar technology platform provider listed on Nasdaq under the symbol NXT, recently disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and complete fiscal year 2025, concluding on March 31, 2025. In Q4 FY25, the company reported revenue of $924 million, marking an increase from $737 million in Q4 FY24 and up from $679 million in Q3 FY25. The GAAP Gross Profit stood at $306 million in Q4 FY25, compared to $340 million in Q4 FY24 and $241 million in Q3 FY25, with the GAAP Gross Margin reported at 33.1%, sliding from 46.2% in Q4 FY24 and 35.5% in Q3 FY25. On the bottom line, Nextracker recorded GAAP Net Income of $158 million in Q4 FY25, down from $223 million in Q4 FY24 and up from $117 million in Q3 FY25, with GAAP Net Income Margin at 17.1% in Q4 FY25, dropping from 30.3% in Q4 FY24 and matching the 17.3% in Q3 FY25. The GAAP Diluted EPS was $1.05 in Q4 FY25, compared to $0.79 in Q3 FY25.
news.headline: Nextracker (Nasdaq: NXT) reports Q4 FY25 revenue of $924 million with 33.1% gross margin and $158 million net income.

news.summary: In Fremont, California, Nextracker (Nasdaq: NXT) revealed its acquisition of Bentek Corporation, a U.S.-based company known for creating electrical infrastructure for various solar power plants. The acquisition, valued at about $78 million in cash with potential additional earnout considerations, brings together Bentek's pre-assembled eBOS solutions with Nextracker's renowned solar tracker platform. This move is expected to enhance Nextracker's position in the solar technology industry.
news.headline: Nextracker buys Bentek Corporation for $78 million, expands solar technology portfolio with eBOS solutions.

news.summary: Rich Okoney recently joined Cushman & Wakefield as the Global Data Center Practice Lead within the Integrated Facility Management Service Line team in Chicago. This move signifies the company's commitment to enhancing its data center services expertise. Okoney brings a wealth of experience to his new role, and his appointment is expected to strengthen Cushman & Wakefield's position in the industry.
news.headline: Cushman & Wakefield appoints Rich Okoney as Global Data Center Practice Lead. #cre #facilitiesmanagement

news.summary: Denver-based Spruce Power Holding Corporation, a key player in the distributed solar energy sector in the U.S., disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The quarter showcased notable achievements: revenues soared to $23.8 million, marking a 30% increase from the previous year; a net loss attributable to stockholders stood at $15.3 million; and operating EBITDA climbed to $12.3 million, representing a 15% rise year-over-year. These figures reflect the company's strong performance and growth trajectory in the renewable energy market.
news.headline: Spruce Power reported Q1 2025 results: $23.8M in revenues (up 30%), net loss of $15.3M, operating EBITDA of $12.3M (up 15%).

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Slide Insurance has confirmed pricing for its latest catastrophe bond, Purple Re Ltd. (Series 2025-1), valued at $250 million. This marks Slide's largest cat bond offering to date, surpassing the previous record by $40 million. The Series 2025-1 bond consists of two fully collateralized classes: $125 million for Class A notes priced at 7.25% and $125 million for Class B notes priced at 7.75%. This offering demonstrates continued growth and investment in the insurance-linked securities market.
news.headline: Slide Insurance secures $250M cat bond with Purple Re Ltd. 2025-1, its largest offering to date, exceeding previous by $40M.
Navigator Gas reports initial Q1 2025 results, awaiting final audit.

Surf Air Mobility is recognized as a prominent regional air mobility platform and is among the biggest commuter airlines in the United States based on scheduled departures. It is also the largest of its kind in the country.
news.headline: Surf Air Mobility (NYSE: SRFM) to present at Jefferies eVTOL / AAM Summit in LA with CEO and COO, significant in regional air mobility.

news.summary: A leading provider of specialized workforce solutions, TrueBlue (NYSE: TBI), based in Tacoma, Washington, revealed that its PeopleReady brand's JobStack staffing app has received several accolades for its exceptional technology and user experience. The app was honored as a platinum award recipient in the 2025 Titan Awards within the Business Technology Solution: Staffing Solution group, signifying its top-tier status among competitors. This recognition highlights JobStack's effectiveness in enhancing business operations.

news.summary: Worksport (NASDAQ: WKSP) is about to release its quarterly earnings report on May 15, 2025. Analysts predict an EPS of -$1.05, with investors eager for possible results surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. The company beat EPS estimates last quarter, resulting in a 3.88% stock price increase. In Q4 2024, Worksport's EPS estimate was -$1.4 but reported -$1.14, leading to a 4.0% stock price increase. As of May 13, Worksport's stock traded at $3.48, down 41.92% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts have given Worksport a consensus Buy rating. This article provides insights for investors leading up to Worksport's earnings release.
news.headline: Worksport (WKSP) to report EPS of $-1.05 on 2025-05-15. Previous beat in EPS resulted in 3.88% share price increase. Stock at $3.48. Analyst consensus for Worksport is Buy.

news.summary: TOMBALL, TX--Acuren Corporation (NYSE American: TIC), a key provider of asset integrity services, revealed that it will transition to the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) from NYSE American. This shift signifies a significant advancement for Acuren, offering greater opportunities for visibility and growth in the market.
news.headline: Acuren Corporation uplisting from NYSE American to New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) effective from May 16, 2025.

This additional recognition boosts its capacity to provide high-quality staffing and full-fledged assistance to Workday clients across the country. Workday, renowned as the AI system for overseeing personnel, finances, and operations, stands as a pivotal platform in modern management. Prior to this, BGSF had been actively involved in serving as a Workda...

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Northrop Grumman Corporation announced the details of its upcoming annual shareholders meeting. The meeting, scheduled for May 21 at 8 a.m. Eastern time, will be held exclusively online. Shareholders can access the virtual meeting by following the provided link or visiting virtualshareholdermeeting.com/NOC2025. Additionally, a link to the meeting will be available on the company's investor relations webpage at http://investor.northropgrumman.com. A replay of the meeting will be accessible for two weeks post the event. Northrop Grumman Corporation is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol NOC.

news.summary: Vienna, VA - Spire Global, Inc. disclosed its performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. A webcast will be hosted at 5:00 p.m. ET today to deliberate on the findings. The Company (NYSE: SPIR), known for providing space-based data and analytics, expressed confidence in capitalizing on market opportunities stemming from increased defense expenditures and the escalating need for weather insights. With a firm space background, Spire aims to leverage its capabilities for growth in these sectors.
news.headline: Spire Global reports Q1 2025 results; webcast at 5pm ET to discuss. Excited about growth opportunities.

news.summary: IREN Limited reported their financial results for the three and nine months ended March 31, 2025, with a 28% growth in profit after tax. The company is pausing mining expansion at 50 EH/s to focus on AI opportunities. In the third quarter of FY25, they had record revenues of $148.1 million, with a 24% increase in Bitcoin mining revenue to $141.2 million and a 33% increase in AI Cloud services revenue to $3.6 million. They mined 1,514 Bitcoin during this period, underpinned by growth in operating hashrate. Total net electricity costs increased to $36.5 million, while other costs remained relatively flat at $25.3 million. Cash and cash equivalents were at $184.3 million as of March 31, 2025. IREN is on track to reach 50 EH/s by June 30, 2025, and is focusing on liquid-cooled AI data centers. They are also expanding AI Cloud Services revenues and evaluating further expansion opportunities in the AI space. The company is setting the benchmark for performance in Bitcoin mining and carries out disciplined capital allocation amid macroeconomic volatility. They are transitioning to US domestic issuer status with US GAAP reporting from July 1, 2025.
news.headline: IREN Limited reported Q3 FY25 Results: $148.1M in revenues, 28% Profit After Tax growth, 50 EH/s mining expansion paused for AI focus.

news.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc, a prominent mass-capacity data storage innovator (NASDAQ: STX), disclosed its management's upcoming participation in investor events. news.headline: Seagate (NASDAQ: STX) to participate in TD Cowen 53rd Annual Conference and Bank of America Securities 2025 Conference.

Xperi specializes in creating technologies that enhance entertainment experiences.

news.summary: Boxlight Corporation (Nasdaq: BOXL) unveiled its financial outcomes for Q1 ended March 31, 2025, showcasing revenue of $22.4 million, marking a 39.5% drop compared to the previous year's quarter. The gross profit margin for Q1'25 saw an uptick to 35.9% from the prior year quarter's 34.5%. However, the net loss amounted to $3.2 million.
news.headline: Boxlight Corp (Nasdaq: BOXL) reports Q1 2025 results: Revenue $22.4M (down 39.5%), Gross profit margin 35.9%, Net loss $3.2M.

news.summary: USA Rare Earth, Inc. announced its first-quarter financial results for 2025, including key highlights such as merging with Inflection Point, beginning trading on Nasdaq, opening an Innovations Lab in Stillwater, Oklahoma, hiring key employees, signing the first customer MOU for rare earth sintered magnet production in 2026, and producing dysprosium oxide from the Round Top deposit with over 99% purity. The company raised over $100 million, opened an Innovations Lab, and advanced processing technologies in Colorado. CEO Joshua Ballard emphasized the company's quick ramp-up to deliver finished magnets to customers in response to growing domestic demand. The company's growth in 2026 is expected to reflect this demand. The press release contains forward-looking statements and non-GAAP financial measures. Adjusted net loss, adjusted undistributed net loss, and adjusted undistributed net loss per common share are non-GAAP financial measures used by the company. There is information on the upcoming conference call to discuss financial results, and financial details are presented in condensed consolidated balance sheets. USA Rare Earth is developing a NdFeB magnet manufacturing plant in Stillwater, Oklahoma, aiming to establish domestic rare earth and critical minerals supply capabilities. The company's financial results showed current assets of $25.8 million and total assets of $77.1 million as of March 31, 2025. Investors can access further details on the investor relations section of the company's website.
news.headline: USA Rare Earth reported Q1 2025 financial results, including $100 million raised, 99% purity dysprosium oxide produced.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, GCT Semiconductor Holding, Inc. recently released their business update along with the financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company reported on the performance of its 4G technologies during this period.

A spokesperson for the company emphasized, "This quarter demonstrates our effectiveness in crucial areas. Blaize has successfully implemented practical solutions that address essential challenges in the market."

news.summary: In Singapore on May 14, 2025, Canaan Inc. (NASDAQ: CAN), a prominent player in the field of crypto mining, disclosed its unaudited bitcoin mining report for April 30, 2025. news.headline: Canaan Inc. (NASDAQ: CAN) updates bitcoin production for April 2025; provided by innovative crypto mining firm in Singapore.

news.summary: A new partnership has been announced during the World Health Assembly, in association with the Sigmastack Climate & Health impact investing platform and Symbiotics. The collaboration between Caring Cross and the Health Innovation Exchange (HIEx) was launched in Geneva on May 14, 2025. This initiative aims to address the intersection of health and climate issues.
news.headline: Caring Cross and HIEx launch partnership to expand affordable care for cancer and sickle cell disease globally in low- and middle-income countries.

news.summary: Vroom, Inc. reported its financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company disclosed significant figures, including $66.9 million in total available liquidity as of the mentioned date, with $14.6 million in cash and cash equivalents. Additionally, there was $27.3 million in liquidity accessible to UACC through warehouse credit facilities and $25.0 million from a line of credit secured in March 2025 using residual certificates.
news.headline: Vroom reports Q1 2025 results: $66.9M in total liquidity, $14.6M in cash, $27.3M available to UACC, $25M from line of credit.

news.summary: Aeva, a prominent player in advanced sensing and perception technologies, unveiled its Q1 2025 financial results. The company reported a record-breaking revenue in the quarter. One of the key highlights was the launch of Aeva Eve 1D, the first-of-its-kind FMCW high-precision laser displacement sensor for industrial automation. Eve 1D is designed to offer superior precision, repeatability, and stand-off flexibility at a reduced size and cost compared to existing laser triangulation solutions.
news.headline: Aeva reports record product revenue in Q1 2025, introduces industry's first FMCW laser sensor for industrial automation.

news.summary: An attorney and traffic safety expert, Amy Witherite, has highlighted a report from California public safety and transportation officials warning of the potential dangers posed by the increased use of autonomous ride-hailing vehicles. The report, conducted by fire, police, and transportation authorities in San Francisco, suggests that granting Cruise & Waymo the freedom to expand their operations without proper oversight could jeopardize public safety. Waymo and Uber are set to introduce these vehicles to Atlanta this summer. The report raises concerns about the risks associated with this expansion.
news.headline: First responders in California & San Francisco caution against deployment of driverless vehicles in Atlanta due to public safety hazards.

news.summary: Boot Barn Holdings, Inc. shared its financial results for the fourth fiscal quarter and fiscal year ended March 29, 2025. In comparison to the same period last year, the net sales for the quarter ended March 29, 2025 saw a significant increase of 16.8% amounting to $453.7 million. Additionally, same store sales experienced a growth of 6.0%. Further details can be found in the Supplemental Financial Presentation on investor.bootbarn.com.
news.headline: Boot Barn Holdings, Inc. reports $453.7 million in net sales, 16.8% increase in Q4 2025, and announces $200 million share repurchase program.

news.summary: San Francisco-based company, Grove, released its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The report includes details on the migration progress of their eCommerce platform. Key figures from the update were not disclosed.
news.headline: Grove reports Q1 2025 financial results in San Francisco, highlights eCommerce platform migration. #GROV

news.summary: During a recent Corporate Research and Development event, promising results were shared regarding the ACR-368 treatment in endometrial cancer patients. The data presented was particularly encouraging as it showcased positive outcomes in individuals who had previously undergone both anti-PD-1 therapy and platinum-based chemotherapy. This news underscores the potential efficacy of ACR-368 in this patient population and offers hope for better treatment options. The event emphasized the significance of these findings in advancing research for endometrial cancer treatment.
news.headline: Acrivon Therapeutics announces Q1 2025 financial results; ACR-368 shows positive data in endometrial cancer after prior treatment.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in San Diego, Aardvark Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: AARD), a company specializing in small-molecule therapeutics for metabolic diseases, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ended on March 31, 2025. Aardvark is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical corporation that concentrates on activating innate homeostatic pathways. This quarter's financial report and business achievements were announced by the company, aiming to advance its innovative treatments.
news.headline: Aardvark Therapeutics (Nasdaq: AARD) released Q1 2025 financial results and business updates.

news.summary: Today, in locations such as Lille (France), Cambridge (Massachusetts, United States), and Zurich (Switzerland) on May 14, 2025, GENFIT (listed on Nasdaq and Euronext under the ticker GNFT) released its 2025 Extra-Financial Performance Report detailing their fiscal year 2024 achievements. GENFIT is focused on enhancing the well-being of patients grappling with rare and severe liver ailments.
news.headline: Biopharmaceutical company GENFIT releases 2025 Extra-Financial Report for fiscal year 2024, aiming to help liver disease patients.

news.summary: New Fortress Energy Inc. (Nasdaq: NFE) has finalized the sale of its Jamaican assets and operations to Excelerate Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EE) for a total of $1.055 billion, as originally disclosed on March 27, 2025. The deal will see Excelerate taking over ownership fully. The transaction aims to help NFE decrease its corporate debt and support general corporate activities with the proceeds.
news.headline: New Fortress Energy sells Jamaica assets to Excelerate Energy for $1.055 billion, announces Q1 2025 results.
